MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-22-2014 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON JAN-26-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. JILL BATES-MOORE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TOM WEN APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. PLAINTIFF IS RENEWING HER APPLICATION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE SINCE THE WITNESS WHO IS ON MEDICAL LEAVE IS UNAVAILABLE. AFTER DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 1/26/15 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE WILL BE MAILED BY THE COURT.
